scripts.sync-design-tokens: doppler run --project mobile --config ${ENV:-stg} -- bash -c 'if [ -z "${FIGMA_API_KEY:-}" ] || [ -z "${FIGMA_FILE_ID:-}" ]; then echo "Skipping design token sync (no Figma project configured)"; else FIGMA_TOKEN=$FIGMA_API_KEY figma-tamagui-sync --fileId=$FIGMA_FILE_ID --out=./src/theme; fi'
scripts.pre-start: yarn sync-env-vars && yarn sync-design-tokens && yarn generate:open-api-hooks
scripts.start:expo: [ ${ENV:-stg} == 'prd' ] && yarn expo start --scheme reflect || yarn expo start --scheme reflect-${ENV:-stg}
scripts.start: yarn i18n && yarn pre-start && yarn start:expo
scripts.dev-client-ios: yarn pre-build && doppler run --project mobile --config ${ENV:-stg} -- eas build --platform ios --profile development --local --output ./sim-dev-client-${ENV:-stg}-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).tar.gz
scripts.dev-client-android: yarn pre-build && doppler run --project mobile --config ${ENV:-stg} -- eas build --platform android --profile development --local --output ./sim-dev-client-${ENV:-stg}-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).apk
scripts.dev-client-ios-device: yarn pre-build && doppler run --project mobile --config ${ENV:-stg} -- eas build --platform ios --profile development-device --local --non-interactive --output ./device-dev-client-${ENV:-stg}.ipa
scripts.dev-client-android-device: yarn pre-build && doppler run --project mobile --config ${ENV:-stg} -- eas build --platform android --profile development-device --local --output ./device-dev-client-${ENV:-stg}-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).apk
scripts.build-ipa: yarn pre-build && doppler run --project mobile --config ${ENV:-stg} -- eas build --platform ios --profile preview --local --non-interactive --output ./device-app-build-${ENV:-stg}.ipa
scripts.build-sim: yarn pre-build && doppler run --project mobile --config ${ENV:-stg} -- eas build --platform ios --profile preview-simulator --local --output ./sim-app-build-${ENV:-stg}-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).tar.gz
scripts.build-apk: yarn pre-build && doppler run --project mobile --config ${ENV:-stg} -- eas build --platform android --profile preview-apk --local --output ./device-app-build-${ENV:-stg}-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).apk
scripts.build-store-ios: yarn pre-build && EXPO_NO_CAPABILITY_SYNC=1 FASTLANE_XCODEBUILD_SETTINGS_TIMEOUT=120 doppler run --project mobile --config ${ENV:-stg} -- eas build --platform ios --profile ${ENV:-stg} --local --non-interactive --output ./store-build-${ENV:-stg}.ipa
scripts.build-store-android: yarn pre-build && doppler run --project mobile --config ${ENV:-stg} -- eas build --platform android --profile ${ENV:-stg} --local --non-interactive --output ./store-build-${ENV:-stg}.aab
scripts.deploy-store-ios: yarn build-store-ios && doppler run --project mobile --config ${ENV:-stg} -- eas submit --platform ios --profile ${ENV:-stg} --path ./store-build-${ENV:-stg}.ipa --non-interactive
scripts.deploy-store-android: yarn build-store-android && doppler run --project mobile --config ${ENV:-stg} -- eas submit --platform android --profile ${ENV:-stg} --path ./store-build-${ENV:-stg}.aab --non-interactive
scripts.functions:deploy:stg: doppler run --project mobile --config stg -- supabase functions deploy --project-ref sznlkorcninofgezkwmy && doppler run --project mobile --config stg -- supabase functions deploy admin-push --no-verify-jwt --project-ref sznlkorcninofgezkwmy && doppler run --project mobile --config stg -- supabase functions deploy expo-update-manifest --no-verify-jwt --project-ref sznlkorcninofgezkwmy && doppler run --project mobile --config stg -- supabase functions deploy revenuecat-webhook --no-verify-jwt --project-ref sznlkorcninofgezkwmy
scripts.functions:deploy:prd: doppler run --project mobile --config prd -- supabase functions deploy --project-ref orrcfftpaxlldolavipm && doppler run --project mobile --config prd -- supabase functions deploy admin-push --no-verify-jwt --project-ref orrcfftpaxlldolavipm && doppler run --project mobile --config prd -- supabase functions deploy expo-update-manifest --no-verify-jwt --project-ref orrcfftpaxlldolavipm && doppler run --project mobile --config prd -- supabase functions deploy revenuecat-webhook --no-verify-jwt --project-ref orrcfftpaxlldolavipm
scripts.functions:push-secrets:stg: doppler run --project mobile --config stg -- bash scripts/push-function-secrets.sh sznlkorcninofgezkwmy
scripts.functions:push-secrets:prd: doppler run --project mobile --config prd -- bash scripts/push-function-secrets.sh orrcfftpaxlldolavipm
scripts.push-ota: doppler run --project mobile --config ${ENV:-stg} -- bash -c 'yarn expo export --platform ios --platform android --output-dir dist && EXPO_UPDATE_CHANNEL=${ENV:-stg} node scripts/push-ota-update.mjs'
